name: finding-unknowns
description: Find and resolve your unknowns before, during, and after implementation - quadrant classification (known/unknown x known/unknown) routed to blind-spot pass, interview, directions & prototypes, reference hunt, change-led plan, deviations log, and a quiz gate. Based on Thariq Shihipar's 'A Field Guide to Fable: Finding Your Unknowns'.

interface.shortDescription: Classify and resolve your unknowns before, during, and after implementation
